_comment: Live state for the L3RAIN Command Center. Mirrors the /status board (https://l3rain-arch-docs-stage.cpda-wdev.workers.dev/status). Your orchestrator / build loop should overwrite this file. department status: working | error | waiting | idle | opening | paused | done. When an agent/department hits a token or rate limit and is NOT producing, write 'paused' (or 'idle') — do NOT leave it 'working'.
